highlights: Sole backend engineer owning Firebase database design and API implementation/maintenance.
Designed concert NFT distribution using Google Maps/Geolocation APIs with proximity and venue rules.
Built sync flows between app data and blockchain records, including end-user eligibility checks.
Supported rollout planning for a 300,000-attendee festival event.
Built scraping/data processing platform using Lambda, S3, API Gateway, EventBridge, Step Functions, Python, and spaCy.
Implemented end-to-end ingestion and normalization for multi-source artist data.
Raised data accuracy to 80-90%, reduced manual entry by ~80%, and lowered infra cost by ~70%.
Integrated Airtable as system of record and exposed APIs for downstream tools.
Contributed to a Razor Pages app and implemented image checks for rotation, color balance, and brightness.
Built dynamic UI components and improved accessibility/cross-browser behavior.
Helped redesign data models and refactor tests; reached 100% unit test coverage and reduced page load time by 30%.
